events.text: Nicolas Nkoulou (Cameroon) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Cameroon 1, Serbia 0. Jean-Charles Castelletto (Cameroon) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner    following a corner.
Christian Bassogog (Cameroon) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.
Goal!  Cameroon 1, Serbia 1. Strahinja Pavlovic (Serbia) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Dusan Tadic   following a set piece situation.
Goal!  Cameroon 1, Serbia 2. Sergej Milinkovic-Savic (Serbia) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Andrija Zivkovic.
Luka Jovic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.
Goal!  Cameroon 1, Serbia 3. Aleksandar Mitrovic (Serbia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Andrija Zivkovic.

Goal!  Cameroon 2, Serbia 3. Vincent Aboubakar (Cameroon) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Jean-Charles Castelletto with a through ball.Goal awarded following VAR Review.
Goal!  Cameroon 3, Serbia 3. Eric Choupo-Moting (Cameroon) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Vincent Aboubakar   following a fast break.
Nikola Milenkovic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
